name: EngramLite + Gated Skips + Full GPTQ + FA3
blurb: 11L 512d with EngramLite (multi-head bigram+trigram hash), sigmoid-gated skip connections, LeakyReLU(0.3)², Turbo-Muon (4 NS steps), coprime-stride loader, Full Hessian GPTQ int6+LZMA, XSA on all 11 layers, FA3 Hopper attention. LR floor 0.05. 87.9ms/step, 6667 steps.
author: icryo
